etymology.description: semantic 目(目) (mù, "eye") + phonetic 袁(袁) (yuán, "long-robed person") -> inspect
etymology.interpretation: The character 睘 combines the element 目(目) (mù, "eye"), which signifies seeing or viewing, with the phonetic component 袁(袁) (yuán, "long-robed person") to convey the act of looking or inspecting closely. The imagery of an eye implies careful observation, aligning with the meaning of 'inspect.'
